uplink.description: Measurement (ct=3): P1 pressure, TOB1 water temp, barometric PBaro + TBaro
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; floats hand-encoded (P1=1.5 bar, TOB1=14.2 C, PBaro=0.998 bar, TBaro=21 C). Expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js and converting to canonical units (bar*100=kPa, C as-is).

uplink.description: Measurement (ct=9): P1 pressure, TOB1 water temp, temperature-corrected conductivity
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; floats hand-encoded (P1=2.345 bar, TOB1=11.7 C, Conductivity Tc=1.234 mS/cm). Expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js and converting to canonical units (bar*100=kPa, mS/cm*1000=uS/cm).

uplink.description: Device information package (func 12): battery voltage + diagnostics
uplink._note: Upstream TTN example input (Apache-2.0). Expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js: battery_voltage -> battery (V), battery_capacity_percentage -> batteryPercent, humidity_percentage -> enclosureHumidity.

uplink.description: Unsupported function code yields an error
uplink._note: Synthetic: function code 200 is neither a measurement (1) nor information (12) package.
